diagrams.title: Process State Transition with wait()
diagrams.description: Shows how a child process transitions through states and how wait() prevents zombie state
diagrams.purpose: Understanding zombie prevention through wait() functions

diagrams.title: wait() vs waitpid() Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision diagram showing behavior differences between wait() and waitpid() with different options
diagrams.purpose: Choosing the right wait function for different scenarios

diagrams.title: Status Word Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the status integer returned by wait() functions showing bit fields
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how wait macros extract information from status

diagrams.title: wait3() and wait4() Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows how wait4() combines functionality of waitpid() and wait3()
